claim: SpaceXAI filing reports about 325000 NVIDIA GPUs and about 1GW compute capacity
handling: Use as supplier total; do not add customer allocations

claim: Anthropic uses more than 220000 SpaceXAI NVIDIA GPUs and at least 300MW
handling: Count as Anthropic short-term external use and subset of SpaceXAI total

claim: Google contracted about 110000 SpaceXAI NVIDIA GPUs
handling: Capacity MW undisclosed; no GW conversion

claim: Anthropic Google agreement can scale to 1000000 TPUs
handling: Keep TPU separate from NVIDIA GPU

claim: CoreWeave had more than 1GW active and more than 3.5GW contracted power
handling: Active is revenue denominator; contracted is pipeline

claim: CoreWeave Q1 2026 revenue was USD2.078bn with USD99.4bn backlog
handling: GAAP revenue; backlog is not revenue

claim: CoreWeave Q1 interest expense was USD0.536bn and net loss USD0.740bn
handling: Use to temper EBITDA and revenue-per-GW conclusions

claim: Nebius targets 0.8-1.0GW connected by end-2026 and more than 4GW contracted
handling: Do not label connected target as current active

claim: Nebius Q1 AI cloud revenue was USD0.3897bn and ARR USD1.92bn
handling: ARR and quarterly revenue kept separate

claim: IREN targets 150000 GPUs and 0.48GW by end-2026
handling: Target not current deployed fleet

claim: IREN targets 1.21GW by 2027 and cites a 5GW secured-power pipeline
handling: Pipeline is option value not active AI cloud

claim: IREN Q1 AI cloud revenue was USD0.0336bn
handling: Use to show early revenue ramp

claim: OpenAI announced Stargate path to 10GW by 2029
handling: Platform capacity may overlap supplier or chip commitments

claim: OpenAI announced 2GW of AWS Trainium capacity
handling: External cloud/chip purchase

claim: OpenAI announced 5GW with NVIDIA and 6GW with AMD
handling: Do not mechanically add to Stargate as physical total

claim: TeraWulf Anthropic project is 401MW critical IT load over 20 years with headline value USD19bn
handling: Long lease; first revenue starts after buildout

claim: Oracle FY26 Q4 OCI revenue was about USD5.8bn and RPO USD638bn
handling: OCI is broader than AI compute

claim: Oracle FY26 free cash flow was negative USD23.7bn
handling: Capital intensity and financing risk

claim: Meta AI compute is reported at about 7GW in 2026 with a 14GW target for 2027
handling: Explicitly label 14GW as 2027 plan

claim: Meta 1.3m mixed-GPU figure was a 2025 year-end target rather than a verified actual
handling: Never present as current confirmed fleet

claim: Google Vizag has an official 1GW commitment while higher 5GW figures refer to hosting or campus potential
handling: Use 1GW committed; 5GW scenario only

claim: AWS Microsoft and Google total-fleet GW estimates include non-AI cloud loads
handling: Context only; exclude from pure-AI ranking

claim: Microsoft Fairwater is a major purpose-built AI datacenter but official post does not establish total Microsoft GW
handling: Do not infer companywide GW

claim: Meta Hyperion uses a joint-venture financing structure
handling: Relevant to capital organization not active GW

claim: CoreWeave annualized revenue density is below about USD8.3bn per active GW
handling: 2.078x4 divided by >1GW; upper bound because denominator exceeds 1

claim: TeraWulf headline annual contract density is about USD2.37bn per GW
handling: 19/20/0.401; not comparable to full-stack GPU cloud

claim: Anthropic SpaceXAI headline price can imply up to about USD50bn per GW-year
handling: Uses at least 0.3GW; actual denominator may be larger; cancellation terms matter

claim: Oracle OpenAI headline obligation can imply about USD13.3bn per GW-year
handling: 300/5/4.5; verify exact term and scope before valuation use

claim: 2026Q2E compute-related supplier revenue estimates are not reported actuals
handling: Label E and show method/range

claim: Risk-adjusted business quality favors load owners over pure capacity owners
handling: Investment judgment not a reported fact

claim: Jensen Huang publicly stated that 6m Blackwell GPUs shipped in the prior four quarters
handling: Use as the hard supply anchor; period differs from calendar-year model estimates

claim: AWS Project Rainier was operational with nearly 500k Trainium2 chips and AWS expected Anthropic to use more than 1m by 2025 year-end
handling: Keep nearly 500k operational separate from the more-than-1m target

claim: Epoch AI estimates cumulative AI-chip units by designer including Nvidia Google Amazon AMD Huawei and Cambricon
handling: Use for order of magnitude only; do not present model medians as company-reported actuals

claim: Epoch AI estimates Nvidia Q1 2026 shipments at about 1.34m units including about 0.99m B300 and 0.35m B200
handling: Latest complete quarter; exclude Q2 2026 rows marked Incomplete from ranking

claim: Epoch AI combines H100 and H200 rather than providing a reliable standalone H200 shipment series
handling: Do not fabricate a standalone H200 unit estimate
